get.description: Get the health status of the server

post.description: Release a sandbox from in-use state while preserving assignment mapping.
Apply for a sandbox of the specified type. One instanceID can have multiple sandboxes.

Manually assign a sandbox to an agent instance from the dashboard.
The sandbox will be reserved for the specified instance.

get.description: Returns the OpenAPI spec for a sandbox type (fetched from an available sandbox instance)

Get all sandboxes assigned to an instance with type, status, and endpoint info.
If type query param is provided, only sandboxes of that type are returned.
Get VNC URLs for all sandboxes associated with an instance
Returns a list of active agent instances (id and name) for sandbox assignment.
get.summary: List agent instances for sandbox assignment

get.description: List all sandbox resources grouped by type, with status and usage info

post.description: Release a sandbox that was acquired via apply. The sandbox becomes available for re-use.
Soft-reset a sandbox by sandbox ID. The lease and assignment are preserved.
Remove a sandbox assignment from an agent instance and release the sandbox.

get.description: Get VNC URL for a specific sandbox by ID

currentStage.description: Lifecycle stage of a single task run: plan | workspace | sandbox | execute | upload | release.

display.description:
Structured display labels (task_label, sandbox_label, sandbox_label_plural,
sandbox_ready_label, sandbox_releasing_label, sandbox_release_label,
environment_label, runner_label, batch_subject_singular,
batch_subject_plural, ...) sourced from the capability card. The frontend
should read these directly instead of pattern-matching `message`.

fields.description: Unordered map of dynamically typed values.

kind.description:
The kind of value.

Types that are valid to be assigned to Kind:

	*Value_NullValue
	*Value_NumberValue
	*Value_StringValue
	*Value_BoolValue
	*Value_StructValue
	*Value_ListValue

BearerAuth.description: Enter your bearer token in the format: Bearer <token>
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
